resultList.dtldesc: Are you ready to live in style and comfort Book your dream villa today With its modern design premium facilities and strategic location this 3 bhk Villa available for sale in Bommasandra Bangalore is an exceptional choice for those looking to invest in a home that offers both luxury and convenience.Property Specifications Thoughtfully designed with spacious interiors and a wellplanned layout this brandnew construction is ideal for families seeking a luxurious yet peaceful home. Spread across a generous super builtup area of 2443 sq. ft. this beautifully eastfacing Villa is structured over two floors. Designed to maximize natural light and ventilation this Villa is Vastucompliant ensuring a harmonious and positive living environment. The flooring is elegantly finished with vitrified tiles adding a touch of sophistication to the interiors.The ground floor features a spacious living area two comfortable bedrooms and 2 westernstyle bathrooms of which one bathroom is attached to the bedroom and the other bathroom is available for common use. Both the bathrooms are equipped with geyser points. This floor also has a living room and a wellappointed kitchen with a granite platform a stainless steel sink and an attached utility space. Finally the first floor hosts an additional bedroom with an ensuite bathroom appointed with geyser points. Additionally there is a private balcony offering stunning views of the lush green surroundings. Facilities Equipped with topnotch amenities this villa provides the perfect setting for a luxurious lifestyle. It comes with covered parking for two vehicles ensuring secure and hasslefree parking. The property enjoys a 24hour water supply from both borewell and municipal sources backed by 100 power backup to ensure uninterrupted comfort. Security is a top priority with a dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance enhancing safety within the premises.Locality Situated behind Narayana Hrudayalaya this villa enjoys a prime location in Bommasandra a welldeveloped neighbourhood with excellent infrastructure. Reputed educational institutions such as EuroKids School are within 500 meters making it ideal for families with children. DMart Bommasandra Grand Fresh Hypermarket and Family Supermarket are just a short drive away. Additionally Axis Bank ATM Punjab National Bank ATM and City Union Bank ATM are close by. The area enjoys seamless connectivity with easily available public transport including buses and autos. Bommasandra Metro Station Hebbagodi Metro Station and Huskur Road Metro Station are close by.

resultList.dtldesc: Set within the well-established SBR Horizon, this 3 BHK flat in Whitefield offers a perfect blend of comfort and convenience. With thoughtfully designed spaces, it provides a welcoming environment for family living. The property is well-connected to major roads, making access to schools, hospitals, and shopping hubs hassle-free.Property SpecificationsDesigned for comfortable living, this 3 BHK fully furnished apartment in SBR Horizon, Whitefield, spans 1,632 sq. ft. and is thoughtfully planned with a north-facing, Vaastu-compliant layout. Positioned on the 2nd floor of a 9-story building, it offers a serene environment with well-lit interiors.The apartment features a spacious living and dining area, ensuring ample room for relaxation and gatherings. An open modular kitchen with a chimney seamlessly connects to a dedicated utility space for added convenience. The three bedrooms include two with attached balconies, offering refreshing views of the swimming pool and greenery, while the third balcony extends from the living area.All three bathrooms 2 attached  1 common are fitted with western-style fixtures and geysers, ensuring modern comfort. High-quality vitrified and wooden flooring enhances the homes elegance. Fully furnished with a dishwasher, oven, wardrobes, beds, sofa, TV, RO system, and air conditioning, this home is move-in ready, offering a hassle-free living experience in a prime location.FacilitiesThe apartment comes with two covered parking spaces and ensures a hassle-free lifestyle with 24-hour water supply from both borewell and corporation sources, power backup, and round-the-clock security with CCTV surveillance. Residents can enjoy premium amenities, including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gym, private terracegarden, and dedicated jogging and strolling tracks. Additional facilities like intercom, maintenance staff, aerobics room, indoor games, squash and badminton courts, kids play area, and fire-fighting equipment enhance comfort and safety. Two lifts provide seamless access, making everyday living convenient.LocalitySBR Horizon offers excellent connectivity with INOX within the campus, TATA Star Bazaar right in front, and Forum Mall nearby. Essential conveniences like schools, hospitals are within a 1 km radius while banks and ATMs are close by. Public transport is easily accessible, with buses and autos readily available, while Whitefield Railway Station and Whitefield Metro Station ensure seamless citywide travel.

If you have been looking for a residence which is a perfect blend of lavishness and comfort, then considering this penthouse is the ultimate choice. So, what are you waiting for!!!::::::Property Specifications::::::Residents here will experience a prosperous living as this 3BHK penthouse is built in accordance with the vaastu principles.  Spectacularly crafted, this dwelling is positioned on the 5th floor of a 5 storey building and remains bright and ward throughout the day.::::::Sprawling across an area of 2350 sqft, this penthouse is complete with 3 generously sized bedrooms, 3 en-suite bathrooms, a restful living room, dining area, puja room to conduct spiritual activities, storeroom, and a modular kitchen.::::::All the bedrooms here are smartly designed and are furnished with stylish wardrobes, and double bed with mattress. Moreover, the master bedroom is installed with an air-conditioner for a cool environment. All the bathrooms of this penthouse are designed in western manner among which 1 bathroom is outfitted with steam and Jacuzzi while the master bathroom is equipped with a bathtub.::::::To add more versatility to the dwelling, the living and dining area is adorned with an AC, TV, sofa set with a center table, and a dining table of-6 seater. The kitchen is thoughtfully designed keeping in view the comfortable space required for cooking and is inclusive of a chimney, polished cooking slab, sink, fridge, ::washing machine, microwave, and an RO- water system.::::::The living room is covered with wooden flooring while the rest of the area is decked with durable vitrified, hence gives it a neat and enduring appeal. In addition, there is an open terrace with a garden which is further equipped with a private gym and home-theatre.::::::Facilities::::::?Satya Greens? is endowed with amenities like clubhouse, gym, pool, garden, kids play area, etc. Apart from this, the penthouse is favoured with 24hours water supply, power backup, a covered parking space, CCTV surveillance, and a security guard.::::::Locality::::::Owning this penthouse is truly a wise decision as the property is close to most of the key social infrastructures like schools, noted banks / ATMs, famous restaurants, shopping malls, supermarkets, post office, etc.  Aster CMI Hospital, clinics, and nursing homes are dotted within the vicinity for any medical assistance.::::::As various public transport facilities are accessible within the neighborhood and the local bus stop is stone throw distance away, commuters will experience stress-free commuting. resultList.dtldesc: Its time to catch hold of this golden opportunity to own your dream home Make a move to this 3 BHK Flat available for sale in Provident Park Square, Judicial Layout, Bangalore. This is the ideal place to build a beautiful life with your loved ones, where comfort meets elegance.Property Specifications Overlooking a serene lake, this under-construction masterpiece is designed to provide residents with breathtaking views and an unparalleled living experience. Expected to be ready for possession by April 2025, this premium home is perfect for those who appreciate natural beauty, thoughtful architecture, and a vibrant lifestyle. Spanning a spacious carpet area of 1000 sq. ft., this east-facing flat is meticulously designed to maximize natural light and ventilation. Situated on the 8th floor of a 14-storey tower, the Vastu-compliant residence welcomes positive energy and harmony. Moving to the floor plan, there is a living cum dining area that is thoughtfully planned to create a warm and inviting atmosphere. The home features 3 bedrooms and 3 western bathrooms, of which 2 are attached bathrooms and 1 is a common bathroom, all equipped with geyser points. A single expansive balcony attached to the hall provides stunning views of the lush garden, childrens play area, main road, and the adjacent shopping mall. To make cooking enjoyable, the kitchen comes with a sturdy platform, a stainless steel sink, and an attached utility space for added convenience. The high-quality vitrified flooring enhances the overall elegance of the space, making it an ideal haven for modern living. Facilities Provident Park Square comes with a host of world-class amenities such as a 24-hour water supply, a huge covered parking space, 100 power backup, a dedicated security guard with CCTV camera surveillance to ensure safety. Modern amenities include a table tennis area, a fully-equipped gym, a basketball court, and a jogging track. The complex has a mini forest, landscaped gardens, and a yoga deck for those who enjoy spending time in nature. Additionally, there is a dedicated play area, skating rink, pet park, multipurpose hall, beautifully maintained party lawn, a common room  library, board games and a pool table.Locality Strategically located off Kanakapura Road, this property offers seamless connectivity to key areas in Bangalore. The Thalaghattapura Metro Station is just a 5-minute drive away, while Silk Institute Station is only 10 minutes away. Commuters will find Kengeri Railway Station at a distance of 9.8 km. Educational institutions namely Janaswekar Public School is 2 km away, Sri Manjunathaswamy Vidyanikethan is 0.8 km away, KSIT Polytechnic College is 3 km away, and City Engineering College is 6.4 km away. The presence of renowned healthcare facilities like Mathru Multi Speciality Hospital is within 3.8 km and Shankar Super Specialty Hospital is 5 km away.

resultList.dtldesc: Strategically located in Kodigehalli, Bangalore, this beautifully designed 2 BHK apartment offers a perfect combination of luxury, comfort, and connectivity. Positioned in a high-rise development, the property stands out with its stunning lake and city views, premium interiors, and thoughtfully planned spaces, making it an excellent choice for both end-users and investors seeking a ready-to-move-in home in a prime location.Property SpecificationsSituated on the 12th floor, this east-facing apartment spans a super built-up area of 1195 sq. ft and is fully Vaastu compliant, ensuring a harmonious living environment. The home features two spacious bedrooms and two bathrooms, including one attached to the master bedroom and one common bathroom, both fitted with modern western-style fixtures, geysers, and shower fittings. The apartment comes fully furnished with high-quality interiors, including beds, side tables, and other essential furniture, offering immediate comfort and convenience. The flooring is finished with elegant vitrified tiles, maintaining a consistent and refined look throughout the home.The apartment includes two large balconies that overlook a serene lake along with clear city views, enhancing the overall ambience with natural light and ventilation. The kitchen is fully modular and equipped with cabinets, chimney, and piped gas connection, along with a well-designed utility area. Electrical fittings such as lights and fans are already installed, ensuring a hassle-free move-in experience.FacilitiesResidents benefit from a wide range of modern amenities within the society, including over 24 lifestyle facilities designed for recreation and convenience. The project offers 100 percent power backup, round-the-clock security with CCTV surveillance, and a well-maintained environment. A covered car parking space is provided, including a generously sized parking area. The presence of a large swimming pool and community-focused features further enhances the quality of living, creating a vibrant and comfortable residential setting.LocalityKodigehalli enjoys excellent connectivity to key employment hubs and commercial centres across Bangalore. The property is centrally located with easy access to areas such as KR Puram, Mahadevapura, Kundalahalli, ITPL, EPIP Zone, and Bagmane Tech Park. Major shopping destinations like Phoenix Marketcity, Nexus Mall, and Shantiniketan are within convenient reach. The locality is also well-supported by reputed educational institutions including Orchid, National Public School, and other prominent schools within a 2 km radius, along with healthcare facilities and daily conveniences. Hoodi Railway Station and nearby metro connectivity further enhance commuting options, making this location highly desirable for professionals and families alike.
